title: Edible Blocks
description: "man, i sure am hungry, that dirt block looks tasty." -sane and normal thing we've all thought before
body:
***WARNING: USE THIS AT YOUR OWN RISK, HERE BE DRAGONS!***

## This mod does exactly as the name suggests, it allows you to eat every block in the game (with a couple exceptions).

![made with fabric 88x31 badge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/566134d54a0d603a50b616650bc189ef3f3ed9b8.png)

### Current Effects:
- Melon
- Honey Block/Honey Comb Block
  - Slowness
- Beehive/Bee Nest
  - Instant Damage
  - Slowness
- Cactus
   - Instant Damage

More to come!


### [Do checkout my other mods!!!](https://modrinth.com/user/nellePoint)
